@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+# Skill Loop Progress
+# Skill: simplify-and-refactor-code-isomorphically
+# Target: /data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/src
+# Total Passes: 10
+# Started: 2026-04-24T23:01:27Z
+
+## Status: COMPLETE - Pass 10 of 10
+
+## Missions
+1. Trait Boilerplate Derives: Find one remaining low-risk hand-written standard trait implementation that can be replaced with a derive or existing crate macro while preserving exact formatting and error semantics.
+2. Pass-Through Wrapper Collapse: Find one pass-through function or wrapper hop with no independent contract and inline it at its only callsite.
+3. Rule-of-3 Helper Extraction: Find three or more near-identical local spans in one module and extract a small helper with unchanged ordering and side effects.
+4. Constant Literal Consolidation: Find repeated magic strings or numeric constants in one bounded module and consolidate them without changing public JSON, CLI, or log text.
+5. Error Mapping Simplification: Find duplicated `map_err` or error-string plumbing in one module and collapse it while preserving variants and messages.
+6. Option/Default Flow Simplification: Find redundant `Option`, `Default`, or builder-style branching in one bounded module and simplify it without changing defaults.
+7. Test Fixture DRY Pass: Reduce duplicated test fixture construction in one test module while preserving test names, assertions, and coverage.
+8. Local Control-Flow Tightening: Simplify one nested conditional or match arm cluster in a single function without changing short-circuit behavior.
+9. Re-Export and Type Alias Audit: Identify one redundant local alias/re-export hop that can be simplified without deleting files or changing public module paths.
+10. Final Rescan and Ledger: Re-run targeted duplicate/slop scans, update artifacts, and make one last safe simplification only if its score is >= 2.0.
+
+## Completed Passes
+### Pass 1 - Trait Boilerplate Derives - 2026-04-24T23:14:10Z
+- Files changed: `src/daemon/protocol.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass1_trait_boilerplate.md`
+- Changes: Replaced hand-written `Display` plus empty `Error` impls for `EncodeError` and `DecodeError` with `thiserror::Error` derives; added a regression test pinning exact display strings and `source() == None`.
+- Commit: 6ca9d612
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 2 - Pass-Through Wrapper Collapse - 2026-04-24T23:24:36Z
+- Files changed: `src/pages/verify.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass2_wrapper_collapse.md`
+- Changes: Removed the private `verify::resolve_site_dir` forwarding wrapper; `verify_bundle` and resolver tests now call the shared `pages::resolve_site_dir` directly with unchanged error semantics.
+- Commit: 0793840e
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 3 - Rule-of-3 Helper Extraction - 2026-04-24T23:33:54Z
+- Files changed: `src/ui/data.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass3_rule_of_3_helper.md`
+- Changes: Extracted `ui_conversation_row_parts` for three duplicated UI conversation row projections while preserving column order, metadata fallback, source normalization, and workspace construction.
+- Commit: 786fc563
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 4 - Constant Literal Consolidation - 2026-04-24T23:46:09Z
+- Files changed: `src/search/tantivy.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass4_constant_literal_consolidation.md`
+- Changes: Extracted private Tantivy env-name constants and `positive_usize_env()` for repeated positive `usize` env parsing while preserving fallback defaults.
+- Commit: ae42d71e
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 5 - Error Mapping Simplification - 2026-04-24T23:58:02Z
+- Files changed: `src/analytics/validate.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass5_error_mapping.md`
+- Changes: Extracted `query_exec_error_check(...)` for duplicated Track A/B query-exec validation error checks while preserving IDs, severity, details, suggested actions, and early returns.
+- Commit: 0e569f92
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 6 - Option/Default Flow Simplification - 2026-04-25T00:10:19Z
+- Files changed: `src/pages/bundle.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass6_option_default_flow.md`
+- Changes: Replaced manual `Default` for `BundleBuilder` with `#[derive(Default)]`, preserving the same `BundleConfig::default()` construction path.
+- Commit: 1cc903c8
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 7 - Test Fixture DRY Pass - 2026-04-25T01:12:52Z
+- Files changed: `tests/metamorphic_stats.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass7_test_fixture_dry.md`
+- Changes: Extracted `StatsFixture` for repeated temp HOME/CODEX_HOME/data-dir setup, indexing, stats capture, and session seeding while preserving test names, assertions, env vars, fixture paths, and seeded data.
+- Commit: 94bab33a
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 8 - Local Control-Flow Tightening - 2026-04-25T01:21:49Z
+- Files changed: `src/pages/config_input.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass8_control_flow_tightening.md`
+- Changes: Collapsed the nested `encryption.chunk_size` validation branch into one `match` while preserving validation order, zero/oversized tie-breaking, and exact error strings.
+- Commit: 3b8b3144
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 9 - Re-Export and Type Alias Audit - 2026-04-25T01:28:23Z
+- Files changed: `src/indexer/mod.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass9_alias_reexport_audit.md`
+- Changes: Removed the private `LexicalRebuildMessageBatch` alias and expanded its three local uses to `Vec<LexicalRebuildConversationPacket>` while leaving public compatibility aliases and connector re-export modules intact.
+- Commit: ba6905b5
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+### Pass 10 - Final Rescan and Ledger - 2026-04-25T01:37:09Z
+- Files changed: `src/encryption.rs`, `refactor/artifacts/20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify/pass10_final_rescan.md`
+- Changes: Ran targeted final scans and extracted a local AES-GCM test assertion helper for nine repeated error assertions while rejecting public wrappers, connector stubs, and workflow comments as non-safe simplification targets.
+- Commit: 45b8c458
+- Verdict: PRODUCTIVE
+
+## Stopped
+- Reason: Pass cap reached (10/10).
+- Final verification: touched-file rustfmt checks passed; targeted tests for passes 7, 8, and 10 passed; `cargo check --all-targets` passed after passes 7-10; `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passed after pass 10.
+- Residual note: full `cargo fmt --check` is currently red on pre-existing formatting in `tests/golden_robot_docs.rs`, `tests/golden_robot_json.rs`, and `tests/metamorphic_agent_detection.rs`, which were outside this loop's touched files and were not reformatted to avoid widening scope.

+# Repeated Simplification Dashboard
+
+Run: `20260424T230127Z-repeated-simplify`
+Skill: `simplify-and-refactor-code-isomorphically`
+Passes: 10/10
+
+## Summary
+
+| Pass | Mission | Files | Key Change | Commit |
+| ---: | --- | ---: | --- | --- |
+| 1 | Trait Boilerplate Derives | 2 | Replaced manual daemon protocol error traits with `thiserror::Error` derives and pinned display/source behavior. | `6ca9d612` |
+| 2 | Pass-Through Wrapper Collapse | 2 | Removed private verify wrapper and called the shared pages resolver directly. | `0793840e` |
+| 3 | Rule-of-3 Helper Extraction | 2 | Extracted a UI conversation row projection helper for three duplicated row paths. | `786fc563` |
+| 4 | Constant Literal Consolidation | 2 | Centralized Tantivy env names and positive `usize` env parsing. | `ae42d71e` |
+| 5 | Error Mapping Simplification | 2 | Extracted duplicated analytics query-exec validation error checks. | `0e569f92` |
+| 6 | Option/Default Flow Simplification | 2 | Derived `Default` for `BundleBuilder`. | `1cc903c8` |
+| 7 | Test Fixture DRY Pass | 2 | Extracted `StatsFixture` for repeated metamorphic stats setup and commands. | `94bab33a` |
+| 8 | Local Control-Flow Tightening | 2 | Collapsed chunk-size validation into one match without changing error text. | `3b8b3144` |
+| 9 | Re-Export and Type Alias Audit | 2 | Inlined a private lexical rebuild batch alias; public aliases stayed intact. | `ba6905b5` |
+| 10 | Final Rescan and Ledger | 2 | Extracted a local AES-GCM error assertion helper after final targeted scans. | `45b8c458` |
+
+## Metrics
+
+| Metric | Result | Status |
+| --- | --- | --- |
+| Passes completed | 10/10 | pass |
+| Productive passes | 10 | pass |
+| Zero-change passes | 0 | pass |
+| Code changes | 10 focused commits | pass |
+| Progress artifact | `.skill-loop-progress.md` updated through completion | pass |
+| Per-pass artifacts | `pass1` through `pass10` present | pass |
+| Full compile gate | `cargo check --all-targets` passed after passes 7, 8, 9, and 10 | pass |
+| Full clippy gate | `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passed after pass 10 | pass |
+| Full fmt gate | `cargo fmt --check` reports unrelated pre-existing formatting drift in three test files | blocked |
+
+## Verification
+
+- PASS: `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check tests/metamorphic_stats.rs`
+- PASS: `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/pages/config_input.rs`
+- PASS: `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/indexer/mod.rs`
+- PASS: `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check src/encryption.rs`
+- PASS: `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_cass_simplify_loop cargo test --test metamorphic_stats`
+- PASS: `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_cass_simplify_loop cargo test pages::config_input --lib`
+- PASS: `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_cass_simplify_loop cargo test aes_gcm --lib`

+- PASS: `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_cass_simplify_loop cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
+- BLOCKED: `cargo fmt --check` wants formatting changes in `tests/golden_robot_docs.rs`, `tests/golden_robot_json.rs`, and `tests/metamorphic_agent_detection.rs`; those files were outside the loop and were left untouched to avoid unrelated churn.
+
+## Stop Reason
+
+Stopped at pass 10/10 because the requested pass cap was reached. The final rescan found one safe test-only candidate with score 5.0 and rejected lower-value public-wrapper/comment surfaces that would have risked API compatibility or reduced test readability.
